description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on every pull request, testing indexed_gzip unit tests across multiple Python versions and operating systems. Use a matrix strategy to test on ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest with Python 3.8 to 3.12, excluding Python 3.12 on Windows. For each job, check out the code, set up Python, create and log a test environment, download zlib on Windows, build indexed_gzip, and run tests.
